name: kh-uaf
description: Pure Python agentic orchestration engine for Antigravity, Codex, Claude Code, and domain-general workflows. Features domain profiles, work design artifacts, asyncio-based parallel workers, Windows app bridge integration, multiprocessing sandboxing, gzip snapshot rollback, and a CLI launcher.
author: KH UAF

skills.name: orchestrate
skills.description: Run the full agent workflow: domain design, artifact persistence, dispatch, parallel bounded task execution, validation, and optional webhook reporting.

skills.name: contracts
skills.description: Shared dataclass contracts for Codex, Antigravity, Claude Code, local adapters, domain profiles, work designs, and artifact manifests.

skills.name: domain-profiles
skills.description: Build domain-neutral DomainProfile and WorkDesign metadata for software, operations, analysis, design, and other workflow topics.

skills.name: artifact-manifest-store
skills.description: Persist work designs and domain design artifacts under .uaf/ and expose ArtifactManifest evidence for workflow gates.

skills.name: resume-handoff
skills.description: Build resume-safe handoff snapshots from goal ledger, artifact manifest, and scoped memory context.

skills.name: evidence-producers
skills.description: Normalize command, review, and QA outputs into GoalState evidence keys.

skills.name: gate-evaluators
skills.description: Focused spec, code-quality, QA, security, and release gate evaluators with structured evidence records.

skills.name: extension-registry
skills.description: Shared registry for pluggable dispatchers, LLM providers, skill harnesses, and host adapters.

skills.name: memory-state
skills.description: Resolve project and conversation scoped persistent memory namespaces.

skills.name: memory-store
skills.description: JSON/JSONL scoped persistent memory store with candidates, events, and cleanup policy.

skills.name: llm-router
skills.description: Built-in OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic routing with custom LLM provider registration.

skills.name: command-check-runner
skills.description: Run bounded local verification commands or named presets and convert subprocess results into evidence records.

skills.name: browser-qa-boundary
skills.description: Browser/QA check contracts, runner boundary, and JSON process sidecar adapter for injected browser adapters or future TypeScript sidecars.

skills.name: workflow-check-stage
skills.description: Typed workflow stage for command and Browser/QA check planning, execution, evidence aggregation, and success calculation.

skills.name: local-generation-adapters
skills.description: Deterministic and LLM-backed local code generation adapters behind LocalTaskRunner.

skills.name: antigravity-native-boundary
skills.description: Native Antigravity dispatch result contract with injected-adapter and JSON process sidecar boundaries.

skills.name: codex-thread-registry
skills.description: Read Codex desktop thread state for active/archived conversation memory cleanup when the local registry is available.

skills.name: windows-app-bridge
skills.description: App-first integration helper for Codex and Antigravity Windows hosts. Builds role-aware AdapterRequest metadata and dispatches without CLI parsing.

skills.name: skill-catalog
skills.description: Packaged UAF skill folder catalog. Add skills as skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md; external plugin folders are not runtime dependencies.

skills.name: snapshot-state-harness
skills.description: Packaged UAF snapshot skill for project-local gzip checkpoints, rollback, and .snapshots metadata protection.

skills.name: host-agent-orchestration
skills.description: Personal UAF host agent, subagent, permission, hook, and observability harness for Codex, Antigravity-style, Claude Code, and local runtimes.

skills.name: orchestration-role-graph
skills.description: Default UAF role graph covering CEO, advisor, architect, controller, implementer, reviewers, QA, security, and release roles.

skills.name: development-lifecycle-harness
skills.description: Personal UAF design, planning, TDD, review, verification, and branch-finishing workflow.

skills.name: domain-orchestration-harness
skills.description: UAF-native domain orchestration harness for mandatory work design, role decomposition, design artifacts, review, QA/QC, risk, policy, and final decision gates.

skills.name: subagent-review-pipeline
skills.description: UAF-native implementer, spec-reviewer, and code-quality-reviewer pipeline for independent subagent tasks.

skills.name: quality-gates-harness
skills.description: UAF-native TDD, systematic debugging, review, and evidence-before-completion gate definitions.

skills.name: command-output-harness
skills.description: Personal UAF command output filtering, grouping, truncation, deduplication, exit-code preservation, and savings tracking.

skills.name: command-hook-policy-harness
skills.description: UAF-native command rewrite, trust, integrity, permission precedence, and non-blocking hook policy harness.

skills.name: review-gate-harness
skills.description: UAF-native review gate harness for structured review workflow patterns.

skills.name: qa-gate-harness
skills.description: UAF-native QA gate harness for regression and verification workflow patterns.

skills.name: context-state-harness
skills.description: UAF-native context save and restore harness for resumable workflow patterns.

skills.name: goal-state-harness
skills.description: UAF-native goal state harness for objective tracking, completion criteria, and evidence-based closure.

skills.name: memory-state-harness
skills.description: UAF-native scoped persistent memory harness for project/conversation memory, candidates, and cleanup policy.

skills.name: guard-policy-harness
skills.description: UAF-native guard policy harness for careful execution, edit boundary, and override workflow patterns.

skills.name: health-check-harness
skills.description: UAF-native health check harness for quality dashboard and release readiness workflow patterns.

skills.name: sandbox
skills.description: Safely execute untrusted Python code with AST filtering and multiprocessing-based timeout kill. Windows compatible.

skills.name: snapshot
skills.description: Commit and rollback file states using gzip-compressed snapshots. Provides 90%+ disk savings over plain-text backup.

skills.name: webhook-server
skills.description: Optional FastAPI webhook receiver for external host callbacks, using aiosqlite + WAL mode and auto log rotation.
